payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You all rush in on the outskirts here to watch. I'll put you in over here to keep an eye on the sidelines. Grog, I need you to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: --and asked you to "show him what you had learned." After slamming his feet into the sand and preparing himself for conflict, he beckons you towards him. And that is where we left off. So--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, oh god, oh god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: --as you're standing up there on the edge of this pit, Groon just stands there with his hand beckoning towards you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I reach into my Bag of Holding, and I pull out a small drawing of the letter "G". This. This is what I have learn-- That's not it. That's not what I wanted. And I take out the Dwarven Thrower and I jump into the sandpit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. (jumping sound) (impact thud) There, as you land in the sand, the bottoms of your boots sinking but a couple of inches into the soft surface. Pike gets ready to leap down after and Groon puts his hand up. "No...."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we're here, we're watching it, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys didn't say if you were catching up with them last time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we said we came in the temple with them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Uh, no, we're totally watching this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So then you guys rush in afterward, hoping that-- Morpheus is fighting Neo, you guys-- (all laugh)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: --as he runs with such speed. And as he lands and finds his footing (loud boom), the weight seems to kick in once more, and you watch as the sand (scattering sound) shoots out behind him. He stands his ground and crosses his arms, and just watches. So Grog, it's your turn. You're stunned. You end your turn, you're no longer stunned. It's now back to him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What does being stunned do? You can't move?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Can't move, can't do anything, you're considered incapacitated.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Groon's in Vegas and your ass just came up pineapples.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm gonna pull an arrow out and just stand there and get ready in case Groon does anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Groon is thinking to go ahead and step back to there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's waiting for you to become unstunned.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And as he darts back, you guys watch as he runs to the back. As he does, his feet barely touch the sand (fast, light footsteps). You see these very faint little plumes behind each footstep, as this giant man has almost no weight across the ground--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He pushes off and manages to hit you in the sternum once again, the same place where the vibrations hit. However this time you grab his hand as it gets there, and it still hits you, but the gauntlets absorb the impact and prevent it from spreading through your body. That ends your turn. It's now his turn. He stands up from prone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a 30. So it hits you. All right, that's 18, halved to nine, take nine points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And I need you to make another constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sick, okay! As you pull up from the hammer, you can see now, there's quite a bit of blood now out of his mouth, and there's a part of the chest where it's pushed in, and you can see where the impact has caused heavy bruising and parts of the skin have broken open from impact. So now he's bleeding in places. You're bleeding all over the place.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So it's just this mess of two somewhat dressed humanoid men covered in their own blood. It's delightful.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, blood and sand. It's encrusted everywhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Be careful, that's how blood diseases are transferred!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's now his turn. As he throws the hammer back over your head, which puts you off-balance, he's gonna go into his first two strikes. The first one is a 21 to hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it is minus five. So, you go bounding up towards him (boom boom boom). He just sits there waiting, his arms up. The first strike, he goes to parry but as you hit (crack), his arm gets knocked out of the way, preventing him from parrying the second strike as it comes down right across the side of the face (boof), hitting him, you watch as blood (splattering sound) across the sand and you see his jaw's kinda momentarily dislodged, his beard just kinda crusted in his own blood. As you come up with a giant over-the-head blow and as it comes down, he (crack) slaps it from both sides and stops it mid-action. You see his hands shaking as he's holding it, and he just kinda looks up in your face, "Good. Good."

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Uh, at this point in time Scanlan's been out for almost a day.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Your back was turned for so much of the time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, I mean, we're outside. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm so sad Scanlan wasn't here for this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know, he would've loved that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like we should go celebrate and drink, but it wouldn't feel right without him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, I need like a million potions, and maybe some attractive naked women to heal me back to my full health.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It has been a while for you, hasn't it, Grog?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Yeah. I'm real cranky so I need bandages, and maybe some bondage, and just all the women.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.. that's exactly what B & B means.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's what the letters for those words are. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How long has Scanlan been out for?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: (huffs) "Well, our stocks have been running low since last time you came through, we don't have much!" He puts up a small leather case and opens it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I didn't abuse him. Everyone else abused him. I was very kind to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your business is not welcome here, goodbye.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Excuse me, has anyone seen my friend Ve-- You.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: -- beautiful salesman, carrier of all delightful things.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: See! We're friends, we're all friends here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Was he uncomfortable seeing you or something?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Said he didn't like me very much.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What do you want from me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We can do business. We cannot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'll just stand next to him while you do business with him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're not welcome in my establishment.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm really hard of hearing. Like, I've been working--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, yeah, it's just muffled, it's just muffled for him.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Aye, but at the very least--" And she reaches over and undoes the bindings on your wrists. Your fingers are a little numb. You pull back and kind of rub them instinctually. She goes, "Don't take too long. I've a mind to speak to you in a minute."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What's going on? Why am I like this? Where am I?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, you killed it, and then we all celebrated, and you had a big orgy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you proposed to this woman downstairs and this was your bachelor party.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You clearly have some very intense dreams, Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I feel like you're fucking with me. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And you hear Kaylie's voice, "Oh, you think that? Probably right true."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, apparently your friends brought me along to make sure that you woke up nice and right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Where are-- are we in Whitestone?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And the dragon is very dead. Very, very dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But you are not. And that's very important.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Kaylie, could you excuse us a moment?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The next morning comes around, you're all in various states of hungover; should you have chosen to imbibe with the rest of the party.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you will. That's extra. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He's wrapping up the show, I can tell. So I came to give Sam a hug.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's not, actually. I don't know where you got that idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I was just getting in a mid-game hug.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys still got shit to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys made promises, you're still on a timeline for some things.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You still have things to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Don't take that as Sam closing the curtain here. Still got shit to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I know, but... I craved that, so I took it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, that's okay. Cross-table hugs are fine.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I know. You recall that in the center of the city itself, Ank'harel, as it acts as one of the largest oases in the center of the central Marquet desert, there are a number of larger trees of various types, and there's one not too far from the Suncut Bazaar, that you recall. You make that your designated tree, and upon casting the spell, you watch the Sun Tree, tear open the doorway, and you step across--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, I mean I trust the others, right, but like... I know you on a more intimate level.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's literally it. I don't know if they've ever had, like, an in depth conversation. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's all. I just-- I just feel a little more sad on the inside. But I'm all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want to see them? Would that make you feel better?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, it's not right, right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, no, it didn't feel right, I just wanted to... all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you know. It's... mmm. You know. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you walk your way down to the center of Whitestone, to the Sun Tree--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's so touching and ridiculous at the same time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And the sun is going down, you said?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The sun has already gone down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Other part of the world.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys begin making your way toward the Debt's Respite, which is the tavern that housed the Scarbearers. This is where Treev Bonebreaker was when you last discussed the return of Ripley's hand--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: -- as the assassin that killed one of their own. And you're returning this hand to absolve yourselves of implication in this murder.
